title: Security Personnel: School Resource Officers
description: School Resource Officers (SROs) are licensed peace officers who work inside Conroe ISD schools to help keep students and staff safe. This policy outlines how the district selects, trains, and oversees these officers, as well as how they interact with students on campus. Parents and community members can use this policy to understand the role SROs play in school safety and how their conduct is guided and monitored.
